LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; AND CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; AND NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CISNEROS, RONALD SCOTT INDIVIDUALLY RONALD SCOTT CISNEROS, INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS NEW PROVIDENCE INTERIORS, INC. calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Index Of Federal Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Leslie V. Freeman, Esq., of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337.1001, appearing for Petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; AND CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; and NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
